title: stelis aviceps
intro: Stelis aviceps, also known as the orchid bee orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been reported to have medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Stelis aviceps include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of infections and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Stelis aviceps are typically made through infusions or decoctions of the plant's roots and leaves, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
